global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with geometric shapes and clear text elements.
global.main_message: Promoting the FluxStream service with a focus on streaming flexibility.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: FluxStream logo
elements.description: The logo features the text 'FluxStream' in a bold, modern font, positioned prominently at the top.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A combination of a large square and a smaller circle, outlined in a lighter shade, is centered in the ad.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: A small circle is placed towards the bottom right, adding visual interest without being a focal point.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The text 'Stream the hype Cancel anytime' is displayed in a large, bold font, centered within the main subject area.

elements.label: Headline text
elements.description: The headline 'FluxStream' is prominently displayed at the top of the ad in a clear, eye-catching font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom reads 'Order now' in a bold font, inviting immediate action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern and minimalistic, FluxStream logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Stream the hype, Cancel anytime, FluxStream, Order now
